reference: I am twenty-nine years old, generally healthy, and fit as I play a lot of football. Over the last few weeks, while playing, my chest becomes tight, I get out of breath easily, and my chest starts wheezing. I have had a virus, but this has been going on for six weeks. What could this be?
text: I am twenty-nine years old, generally healthy and fit. As I play a lot of football, for the last few weeks, while playing, my chest becomes tight. I get out of breath easily, and my chest starts weeping. I have had a virus, but this has been going on for six weeks. What could this be?
